log: REASONING: Power Word Stun on Tortle — Armored Escapist (HP 59 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:10+9=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.

→ Tortle — Armored Escapist: CON save [d20:9+3=12 vs DC 20] FAIL! 38 necrotic damage. HP: 21/59
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Lich (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:14+9=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.

→ Tortle — Armored Escapist is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Fireball (Level 3 slot, 1 remaining). DC 20 DEX save. 20ft sphere.
→ Tortle — Armored Escapist: FAIL! 33 fire damage + .
